title: boltonia integrifolia
intro: Boltonia integrifolia, also known as White Doll's Daisy or White Swamp Aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boltonia integrifolia include treating fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as being used as a diuretic to relieve kidney issues. Herbal preparations of Boltonia integrifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
